checkin.journal:
Slept good but woke up early - was a weird morning as clock moved - thats why I am sleepy in evening
Morning walkie 
Exercised - different exercises - my neck was a bit better today
Breakfast dannys long time no dannys - was good
Walkie from Spinola to Home - great temperature

Spoke to Sandi and told him about Malta apartment
Evening walkie
Was thinking about the party this year
A bit melancholic due to being back to Malta I think partly due to war
